title: The Party Clothes Swap
description: The Party Clothes Swap Come and swap your pre loved party gear and get yourself some amazing new clothes while saying no thanks to fast fashion. The Party Clothes swap is a zero waste, circular economy sustainable fashion project for all - brought to you by Sew Fabulous Brighton and Brighton Fashion Collective The way it works: Bring your pre loved garments to exchange for tokens to spend at the swap. All items will be graded according to amazingness. You’ll get different ‘value’ tokens depending on the quality of what you bring. What is suitable? Good condition clean clothing Think... Sparkly, glittery, festival clothes, party garments, outrageous outfits, costume, fancy, over the top, rave, party, festival, fun. We want people to have access to good fun party gear. To look good and to feel good without costing the earth. This is a space packed with party clothing with on-site stylists to help you choose your new look. Expect fun and sequins.

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
